notes: Seti Astro Suite Pro V1.12.1 Workflows support multiple branches, see the precanned mono narrowband workflow for an example. CC Darkstar engine now benefits from the same speed boost architecture that sharpen and denoise are using.  V1.12.0 Introducing Workflows in SASpro. Find it under the Menu bar Workflows. Workflows are to help guide you in your processing, load up a pre canned workflow if you have no idea where to start your processing journey, create your own, or even share workflows with each other!. Cosmic Clarity DarkStar AI4: Major upgrade to DarkStar bringing my AI4 architecture to star removal.
